questions.hindi: उसने एक case study present किया जिसमें उसने बताया कि उन्होंने कैसे challenge overcome किया था।
questions.english: She presented a case study in which she explained how they had overcome the challenge.
alternatives: Her case study described how the team had dealt with the challenge.
questions.hint: She + presented + case study + in which + she + explained + how + they + had + V3

questions.hindi: उसे उस event में खाने का intézm करना था।
questions.english: He had to arrange the food for that event.
alternatives: He had to organise catering for that event.
questions.hint: He + had to + arrange + noun + for + noun

questions.hindi: मुझे guest list बनानी थी।
questions.english: I had to make the guest list.
alternatives: I had to prepare the guest list.
questions.hint: I + had to + make + noun

questions.hindi: उन्हें उस project के सभी stakeholders को साथ लेकर चलना था।
questions.english: They had to keep all the stakeholders of that project aligned.
alternatives: They had to bring all project stakeholders on board.
questions.hint: They + had to + keep + all + noun + aligned
questions.grammarRule: [Subject] + had to + keep + all + the + [noun] + aligned

questions.hindi: मुझे वह complaint letter personally draft करना था।
questions.english: I had to personally draft that complaint letter.
alternatives: I had to write that complaint letter myself.
questions.hint: I + had to + personally + draft + noun

questions.hindi: उसे उस tough situation में calm रहना था।
questions.english: She had to stay calm in that tough situation.
alternatives: She had to keep her cool in that difficult situation.
questions.hint: She + had to + stay + calm + in + noun

questions.hindi: जब company का सबसे बड़ा client चला गया, सबको बहुत shock लगी थी।
questions.english: When the company's biggest client left, everyone had received a big shock.
alternatives: The whole team had a major shock when the biggest client departed.
questions.hint: When + simple past + everyone + had + V3 + noun

questions.hindi: वह पहला मौका था जब उसे ऐसी ज़िम्मेदारी मिली थी।
questions.english: It was the first time he had been given such a responsibility.
alternatives: It was the first occasion he had received such responsibility.
questions.hint: It was + first time + he + had been + V3 + such + noun
questions.grammarRule: It was the first time + [subject] + had been + [V3] + such + [noun]

questions.hindi: Interview में उसने जो कहा वह उसे सबसे अच्छा candidate बनाता था।
questions.english: What he had said in the interview made him the best candidate.
alternatives: What he said during the interview marked him as the top candidate.
questions.hint: What + he + had + V3 + in + noun + made + him + adjective + noun
questions.explanation: said = V3 of say। made = simple past।

questions.hindi: मैंने पहले कभी ऐसी team के साथ काम नहीं किया था।
questions.english: I had never worked with such a team before.
alternatives: I had never experienced working with such a great team.
questions.hint: I + had + never + V3 + with + such + noun + before
questions.grammarRule: I + had + never + [V3] + with + such + a + [noun] + before

questions.hindi: उस अनुभव से उन्होंने जो सीखा था वह उनके करियर में काम आया।
questions.english: What they had learned from that experience helped them in their career.
alternatives: The lessons they had gained from that experience proved useful in their careers.
questions.hint: What + they + had + V3 + from + experience + simple past + career
questions.explanation: learned = V3 of learn। helped = simple past।

questions.hindi: जब वे दोनों बहुत पहले मिले थे तब उन्हें नहीं पता था कि एक दिन साथ काम करेंगे।
questions.english: When they had first met long ago, they had not known they would work together someday.
alternatives: They hadn't imagined they'd work together when they first met.
questions.hint: When + past perfect + they + had + not + V3 + that + future
questions.grammarRule: When + [past perfect] + [subject] + had not + [V3] + they would + [base verb]

questions.hindi: उसने जब घर छोड़ा, उसके पास सिर्फ एक सूटकेस था।
questions.english: When he left home, he had only one suitcase.
alternatives: He left home with just a single suitcase.
questions.hint: When + simple past + he + had + only + one + noun
questions.explanation: Past possession at the time of action।

questions.hindi: जब तक journey end हुई, उसने बहुत कुछ experience किया था।
questions.english: By the time the journey ended, she had experienced a great deal.
alternatives: She had gone through a lot by the time the journey was over.
questions.hint: By the time + simple past + she + had + V3 + noun
questions.grammarRule: By the time + [simple past] + [subject] + had + [V3] + a great deal

questions.hindi: Story का hero एक ऐसा आदमी था जिसने पहले कभी हार नहीं मानी थी।
questions.english: The hero of the story was a man who had never given up.
alternatives: He was a man who had never accepted defeat.
questions.hint: Hero + was + noun + who + had + never + V3
questions.explanation: given up = V3 of give up।

questions.hindi: वह जो सपना उसने देखा था, आज सच हो गया था।
questions.english: The dream he had dreamt had come true today.
alternatives: Today, the dream he had seen had finally become real.
questions.hint: Dream + he + had + V3 + had + come + true + time
questions.explanation: dreamt = V3 of dream। come true = सच होना।
questions.grammarRule: The dream + [subject] + had + [V3] + had + come + true

questions.hindi: उसे office में नई process implement करने के लिए पूरी team को convince करना था।
questions.english: He had to convince the whole team to implement the new process in the office.
alternatives: He had to bring the entire team on board for the new process.
questions.hint: He + had to + convince + team + to + base verb + noun
questions.explanation: convince to implement = implement करने के लिए राज़ी करना।

questions.hindi: उसे देर रात तक client emails का reply करना था।
questions.english: She had to reply to client emails until late at night.
alternatives: She had to respond to client emails late into the night.
questions.hint: She + had to + reply + to + noun + until + late + time
questions.explanation: late at night = देर रात तक।
questions.grammarRule: [Subject] + had to + reply to + [noun] + until + late at night

questions.hindi: मुझे उस negotiation में अपनी company की position defend करनी थी।
questions.english: I had to defend my company's position in that negotiation.
alternatives: I had to stand up for my company's stance during the negotiation.
questions.hint: I + had to + defend + possessive + noun + in + noun
questions.grammarRule: I + had to + defend + my + [noun]'s + [noun] + in + [noun]

questions.hindi: उन्हें company की 10 साल की journey का presentation देना था।
questions.english: They had to give a presentation on the company's 10-year journey.
alternatives: They had to present the company's decade-long story.
questions.hint: They + had to + give + presentation + on + noun + journey
questions.grammarRule: [Subject] + had to + give + a presentation + on + [noun]'s + [noun]

questions.hindi: जब तक उसकी story पूरी हुई, सारे audience की आँखें नम हो चुकी थीं।
questions.english: By the time his story ended, the eyes of the entire audience had become moist.
alternatives: When he finished telling his story, all eyes in the audience had welled up.
questions.hint: By the time + simple past + audience + eyes + had + V3
